children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is hereby established a Farm Credit Insurance Fund (hereinafter referred to in this section as the “Insurance Fund”) for insuring the timely payment of principal and interest on insured obligations. The assets in the Fund shall be held by the Corporation for the uses and purposes of the Corporation.

children.heading: Amounts in Fund
children.label: b Amounts in Fund
children.text: The Corporation shall deposit in the Insurance Fund all premium payments received by the Corporation under this part.

children.heading: Mandatory use
children.label: 1 Mandatory use
children.text: Beginning , the Corporation shall expend amounts in the Insurance Fund to the extent necessary to insure the timely payment of interest and principal on insured obligations.January 1, 1993

children.heading: Other mandatory uses
children.label: 2 Other mandatory uses
children.text: Beginning , the Corporation shall use amounts in the Insurance Fund to ensure the retirement of eligible borrower stock at par value under .January 1, 1993section 2162 of this title

children.heading: Permissive uses
children.label: 3 Permissive uses
children.text: The Corporation may expend amounts in the Insurance Fund to carry out and to cover the operating costs of the Corporation.section 2277a–10 of this title

children.heading: Corporate payment or refunds
children.label: 4 Corporate payment or refunds
children.text: The Corporation shall make all payments and refunds required to be made by the Corporation under this part from amounts in the Insurance Fund.
